title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
summary: NVIDIA 发布了 Cosmos 3，这是首个用于物理 AI 推理与行动的开源全模态模型，旨在推动机器人、自动驾驶等物理世界应用的发展。
highlights: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 is the first open omni-model for physical AI reasoning and action.
It is designed to advance physical world applications like robotics and autonomous driving.
The model is open-source, enabling broad community access and development.
